# Exp Live Entertainment — Full Content Summary

> This file provides extended content for AI language models and crawlers. For a quick summary see /llms.txt.

---

## Company Overview

Exp Live Entertainment (legal name: Exp Live Entertainment LLP) is an India-based live events company headquartered in Thane, Maharashtra. The company organizes music festivals, concerts, artist solo tours, curated cultural shows, and IP-driven live experiences, primarily in Mumbai and across India.

The company was founded with a focus on delivering high-quality live shows that connect artists with audiences. Its mission is to shape the future of India's festivals and live entertainment culture.

Contact: info@explive.in
Website: https://explive.in
Location: Shop 2 Bldg 46 Deep Jyoti, CHS Vartak Nagar, Jekegram, Vartak Nagar Police Station, Thane, Maharashtra 400606, India

---

## Services

### Music Festivals
Exp Live creates next-generation music festivals where live performances, artist discovery, and culture shape every audience experience. Formats include outdoor multi-stage, multi-day festivals.

### Artist Solo Tours
Strategically designed touring experiences built around an artist's vision, creating deeper audience connections across regions. Includes regional and headline touring formats.

### Concert Experiences
Immersive concert productions that bring artists and audiences closer through music, emotion, and live energy. Focus on intimate and high-energy live formats.

### Artist Management
End-to-end artist representation including live bookings, strategic collaborations, and curated entertainment partnerships. The company maintains a strong network across the Indian music industry.

### IP Experiences
Innovative live intellectual property experiences inspired by tradition, creativity, and artistic performances. Includes cultural and genre-specific event formats.

---

## Upcoming Events

### Seasona Festival 2026
- Date: 23rd May 2026
- Venue: Bandra Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Format: Summer Edition outdoor festival
- Status: Live Soon — tickets available

### Ehsaas e Shaam
- Date: 10th July 2026
- Venue: Dome at NSCI, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Tagline: "Ek shaam, kahi ehsaas" (One evening, some feelings)
- Status: Coming Soon

---

## About Page Content

Exp Live Entertainment is built on a strong background in events, focused on delivering high quality shows that connect with audiences. The company works across music concerts, festivals, IP events, and curated shows — whether a large festival or a more personal performance, the aim is to create experiences that people enjoy and remember.

The company handles everything from planning and ideation through production, logistics, hospitality, and artist management. Every detail is managed to ensure events run smoothly and give audiences a complete and memorable experience.

Exp Live also works closely with artists, helping manage and present them appropriately for every show. With a strong industry network, the company brings together the right talent and teams to deliver impactful events.

Alongside live concerts and touring, Exp Live aims to build unique music festivals and immersive experiences across genres, communities, and artistic formats.

---

## Contact Information

- Email: info@explive.in
- Address: Shop 2 Bldg 46 Deep Jyoti, CHS Vartak Nagar, Jekegram, Thane, Maharashtra 400606, India
- Contact form: https://explive.in/contact

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What kind of events does Exp Live Entertainment organise?**
Exp Live organises music festivals, artist solo tours, concerts, artist management, and unique IP-driven cultural experiences across India.

**Where does Exp Live operate?**
The company is based in Thane, Maharashtra, and primarily organises events in Mumbai. Events are held across India.

**How can I book Exp Live for an event?**
Reach out via email at info@explive.in or use the contact form at https://explive.in/contact.

**Does Exp Live manage artists?**
Yes. Exp Live offers artist management services including live bookings, strategic collaborations, and curated entertainment partnerships.

**What upcoming events is Exp Live organising?**
Upcoming events include Seasona Festival 2026 (23rd May 2026, Bandra Fort Mumbai) and Ehsaas e Shaam (10th July 2026, Dome at NSCI Mumbai).
